criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads from app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration for personalized recommendations, search, and other features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and navigation within the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, app store descriptions

criteria.name: Product Variety
criteria.description: Range and variety of products available on the platform.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, app store descriptions

criteria.name: Security Features
criteria.description: Features ensuring the security of user data and transactions.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and new feature releases.
